drills.title: Had To / Will Have To — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I had to go to office yesterday.
sentences.pronunciation: i had to go to office yesterday

sentences.english: I will have to go to office tomorrow.
sentences.pronunciation: i will have to go to office tomorrow

sentences.english: He had to complete this work.
sentences.hindi: उसे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ा।
sentences.pronunciation: he had to complete this work

drills.title: Had To / Will Have To — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: He will have to complete this work.
sentences.hindi: उसे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ेगा।
sentences.pronunciation: he will have to complete this work

sentences.english: We had to follow the rules.
sentences.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना पड़ा।
sentences.pronunciation: we had to follow the rules

sentences.english: We will have to follow the rules.
sentences.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना पड़ेगा।
sentences.pronunciation: we will have to follow the rules

drills.title: Had To / Will Have To — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: She had to wake up early every day.
sentences.pronunciation: she had to wake up early every day

sentences.english: She will have to wake up early every day.
sentences.pronunciation: she will have to wake up early every day

sentences.english: Did you have to do this?
sentences.pronunciation: did you have to do this

drills.title: Had To / Will Have To — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: Will you have to do this?
sentences.pronunciation: will you have to do this

sentences.english: He had to work very hard.
sentences.pronunciation: he had to work very hard

sentences.english: He will have to work very hard.
sentences.pronunciation: he will have to work very hard

drills.title: Had To / Will Have To — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: I had to pay money.
sentences.pronunciation: i had to pay money

sentences.english: I will have to pay money.
sentences.pronunciation: i will have to pay money

sentences.english: We had to fill the form.
sentences.pronunciation: we had to fill the form

drills.title: Had To / Will Have To — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: We will have to fill the form.
sentences.pronunciation: we will have to fill the form

sentences.english: You did not have to do this.
sentences.pronunciation: you did not have to do this

sentences.english: You will not have to do this.
sentences.pronunciation: you will not have to do this

drills.title: Had To / Will Have To — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: She had to give proof.
sentences.pronunciation: she had to give proof

sentences.english: She will have to give proof.
sentences.pronunciation: she will have to give proof
